name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_tsrc_uvw_kpi456_incidents
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_tsrc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_kpi456_incidents' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`DateKey` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`OccurrenceDateandTime` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`DetectedDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`InitiatedDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ArrivalOnSiteDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`DateKey` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`OccurrenceDateandTime` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`DetectedDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`InitiatedDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ArrivalOnSiteDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'DateKey|OccurrenceDateandTime|DetectedDateTime|InitiatedDateTime|ArrivalOnSiteDateTime' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_tsrc`.`uvw_kpi456_incidents`

error.message:
[INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS] Insufficient privileges:
Table 'uvw_kpi456_incidents' does not have sufficient privilege to execute because the owner of one of the underlying resources failed an authorization check. SQLSTATE: 42501
